name: Strawberry Fruit Frost
recipeIngredient: 2 Small or 1 1/2 large Bananas, thoroughly ripe and broken into 1-inch pieces
1 cup Frozen or canned peaches, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except ice cubes in the blender container.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the ice cubes.
4. Blend until smooth.
